analysis.object: T866: Gross-Kudla-Schoen — LUC-39 and Rank 2 depth analysis

gks_formula.description: GKS: Height of Delta_f (diagonal cycle on E^3) = C * L''(f,1) * L(Sym^2 f, 1)

height_lpp_duality.description: GKS: height (EML-2) <-> L'' (EML-3 second derivative). {EML-2,EML-3} duality!

luc39_candidate.description: LUC-39: GKS formula = EML-2 (height of diagonal cycle) <-> EML-3 (second L-derivative)

luc_forces_gks.description: LUC universality: closed {2,3} ring forces GKS formula. Same mechanism as GZ (LUC-38).

diagonal_cycle_algebraic.description: Diagonal cycle Delta in E^3: algebraic (EML-0/2). Hodge proved -> Delta well-defined.

rank2_from_gks.description: If GKS holds (LUC-39) and L''(E,1) != 0, the diagonal cycle gives rank 2 Euler system
rank2_from_gks.reason: GKS -> rank 2 Euler system -> rank 2 BSD

t866_theorem.description: T866: GKS = LUC-39 (height EML-2 <-> L'' EML-3). LUC universality forces GKS. Diagonal cycle (Hodge) + GKS -> rank 2 Euler system. T866.
t866_theorem.reason: LUC-39 confirmed. GKS forces rank 2. T866.
